name: Jasmine Oil/Extract
description: This INCI designation, mandatory in Europe, refers to the presence of one or more species of Jasmine (Jasminum Grandiflorum, Jasminum Officinale) in the composition of the product, when their concentration exceeds 0.001% in leave-on products and 0.01% in rinse-off products.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.
